arts.ttl: Club chief hints at tempting offer to Liverpool transfer target if he decides to stay
arts.sum: Bayern Munich director Max Eberl has suggested that midfield star Joshua Kimmich could be club captain one day if he signs a new contract to stay at the club amid transfer interest from Liverpool. arts.ttl: AC Milan want to sign £21m player but Tottenham have already agreed a deal
arts.sum: Tottenham have edge over AC Milan in the race to sign La Liga midfielder. Spurs sold Giovani Lo Celso to Real Betis in the summer transfer window. In that same deal, they negotiated that the La Liga side would have to inform the Premier League side about any bid for Johnny Cardoso. arts.ttl: Milan manager explains differences between Arne Slot and Jurgen Klopp
arts.sum: Speaking to the press ahead of Tuesday's encounter, Fonseca was asked to explain how Slot's Liverpool differ from the team under Klopp. AC Milan head coach Paulo Fonseca believes the main difference between Liverpool boss Arne Slot and predecessor Jurgen Klopp is how they build attacks from out wide.

arts.ttl: Popular Amazon Prime feature to make its Champions League debut TONIGHT in blockbuster showdown between AC Milan and Liverpool
arts.sum: Amazon Prime have gained the rights to show Champions League football this season, and they are set to make an instant splash when the action gets underway tonight.
